allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "HOME status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Fullstack Developer'\) {"  -> hero text rendered OK"} } catch { "HOME error: $_" }; try { $c = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/api/contact -Method POST -Body '{"name":"Test","email":"t@example.com","message":"hi there"}' -ContentType 'application/json' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "API status: $\($c.StatusCode\)  body: $\($c.Content\)" } catch { "API error: $_" })
